title: PlaceName Node
description: Time-bounded name attestation for a Place. A Place may have multiple names across time and language (e.g., Byzantium -> Constantinople -> Istanbul). Sources: Pleiades names[], Wikidata labels/aliases.

name_id.description: Unique identifier, pattern: pname_{pleiades_id}_{index} or pname_{qid}_{index}

name_string.description: The name as attested or romanized

attested_form.description: Name in original script if available (e.g., Greek, Latin inscription form)

language.description: ISO 639 language code (la, grc, ar, tr, etc.)

start_year.description: Year this name comes into use. Negative for BCE.

end_year.description: Year this name goes out of use. Negative for BCE.

source_id.description: Identifier in the source system (Pleiades name URI, Wikidata statement ID)

is_primary.description: Whether this is the preferred display name for its time period
